reviews.review_description: Would be way cool but I don't have a controller, so I can't play the app! Would be cool if you could just punt and tap on the pad.

It seemed like a good idea: allow anyone to create 3D worlds in VR, including a marketplace to buy and sell assets. Unfortunately, what's available is just three mediocre minigames and plenty of user generated "experiences" that doesn't work on the Oculus Go (at least I couldn't make my character move in those experiences)...

reviews.review_title: Low frame rate but cool idea
reviews.review_description: Whenever I run a map it is a little hard to move around because the frame rate is so low but the concept is cool

reviews.review_title: It feels like a VR-first Minecraft
reviews.review_description: This is one of the cooler Gear apps. Voxelus enables people to make maps on desktop and play/share/edit them in VR. It's quite nifty and if they keep developing this I think it can be a premier experience on Gear.
i cant walk / do thinks   i can only stay  and look ?
Love it make your own world make a maze or what ever you want and be ib thw world you make its the most fun thing i have ever played

reviews.review_title: Good concept, no good content yet

reviews.review_description: This is a great way to start your own game or just play/test all the others. There are soooo many different types and really like where this is going in vr.
Was interested in trying it but it seems it no longer connects to server can’t sign in or sign up.
Mann i hop pvp is coming..and maybe a gun or crosshair then we'll be in action.
